channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.title: ☕ nullpointexception-i/agent-sphere (352 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nullpointexception-i

📝 Repository: nullpointexception-i/agent-sphere

📄 Descrizione: This project is an AI Agent orchestration platform. It uses an LLM-driven decision engine, combined with capabilities (built-in tools, MCP protocol, CLI execution, browser operations, etc.), to achieve a basic closed loop from perception → planning → execution → feedback.本项目是一个面向 AI Agent 编排平台。它通过 LLM 驱动的决策引擎，结合能力（内置工具、MCP 协议、CLI 执行、浏览器操作等）

⭐ Stelle: 352

🍴 Forks: 12

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: agent agentic-ai java llm reactjs

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-19T11:53:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-17T18:22:57Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-18T02:06:27Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-17T02:02:31Z

item.title: ☕ DerekYRC/mini-claude-code (112 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DerekYRC

📝 Repository: DerekYRC/mini-claude-code

📄 Descrizione: mini-claude-code: a simplified Java Claude Code agent distilling core Agent Harness mechanisms. Features: Agent Loop, tools, permission control, Hooks, Todo, Subagent, Skill Loading, context compression, memory, tasks, background tasks, scheduling, multi-agent collaboration, team protocol, autonomous claiming, MCP Plugin.

⭐ Stelle: 112

🍴 Forks: 17

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-13T06:09:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-11T12:19:16Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ klboke/kkRepo (81 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: klboke

📝 Repository: klboke/kkRepo

📄 Descrizione: kkRepo is a Nexus-compatible, self-hosted artifact repository for Maven, npm, PyPI, Go, Helm, NuGet, Cargo/Rust, Dart/Pub, Docker/OCI, RubyGems, and Yum artifacts. It supports one-click migration from Nexus to kkRepo.

⭐ Stelle: 81

🍴 Forks: 9

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: artifact cargo dart flutter maven maven-repository nexus npm nuget pubdev pypi pypi-mirror

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T11:12:47Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-11T02:44:41Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: kuohsuanlo

📝 Repository: kuohsuanlo/LazyContainerAgent

📄 Descrizione: Java agent for Minecraft server platform PaperMC that lazily deserializes chest/container items — removes the chunk-load NBT unpack lag from large storage and map-art. Zero data risk (shadow-validated).

⭐ Stelle: 80

🍴 Forks: 10

💻 Linguaggio: Java
